panels.title: Hook events
panels.description: Total connector hook invocations in range.

panels.title: Connectors active
panels.description: Distinct hook connectors with activity in range.

panels.title: User prompts
panels.description: Prompt-submit hook events.

panels.title: Tool calls
panels.description: Pre-tool-use hook events (tool calls observed).

panels.title: Shadow blocks
panels.description: Actions a policy WOULD have blocked (observe mode -> allowed).

panels.title: Findings
panels.description: Scan findings emitted in range (all scanners).

panels.title: Input tokens
panels.description: Prompt plus cache-read and cache-creation tokens reported during the current gateway process. Cumulative values retain usage emitted before Prometheus's first scrape after a rebuild.

panels.title: Output tokens
panels.description: Model output tokens reported during the current gateway process. Missing provider usage remains absent rather than being synthesized as zero.

panels.title: Prompt to tool to verdict flow
Hook events / sec by phase
panels.description: Lifecycle phases: prompt, tool_call, tool_result, stop, sessionstart, other.

panels.title: Hook events / sec by connector
panels.description: Per-connector hook throughput (hook-agnostic).

panels.title: Events by phase
panels.description: Share of hook events by lifecycle phase in range.

panels.title: Events by connector
panels.description: Share of hook events by connector in range.

panels.title: Gateway event types (range)
panels.description: Structured gateway events by type: tool_invocation, lifecycle, llm_prompt, scan, scan_finding, error.

panels.title: Shadow blocks - what observe mode caught (would_block=true)
Shadow blocks / sec by connector x severity
panels.description: Would-be blocks by connector and severity.

panels.title: Shadow blocks by severity
panels.description: Severity mix of would-be blocks.

panels.title: Shadow blocks by phase
panels.description: Which lifecycle phase triggered the would-be block.

panels.title: Token usage observations
panels.description: Number of input/output/cache usage measurements reported by providers in the selected range. This is telemetry coverage, not the number of LLM calls.

panels.title: Shadow block detail (full payload + policy reason)
panels.description: Every would-be block with connector, phase, severity and policy reason. Expand a line for the full structured payload + the exact command.

panels.title: LLM and tokenomics - prompt to model to tokens to cost
Tokens / sec by type
panels.description: input / output / cacheRead / cacheCreation tokens per second.

panels.title: Estimated cost $/hr by model
panels.description: Approx hourly LLM spend by model (tokens x price). Estimate.

panels.title: Tokens by model family (gateway run)
panels.description: Total reported tokens by bounded model family. The 'other' bucket is intentional cardinality protection; inspect prompt/response logs or trace attributes for the exact raw model name.

panels.title: Tokens by provider (gateway run)
panels.description: anthropic / other - which provider served the tokens.

panels.title: LLM call duration p95 by model
panels.description: 95th percentile gen_ai.client.operation.duration per model.

panels.title: Tokens by conversation, model & type (gateway run)
panels.description: Per-conversation provider-reported token totals split into input, output, cacheRead, and cacheCreation. Blank conversation means the upstream metric did not carry a session id; absent rows mean usage was not reported, not zero.

panels.title: LLM prompts (live)
panels.description: Prompt events captured at the gateway. Expand for full prompt content + model.

panels.title: LLM responses (live)
panels.description: Observed model/agent outputs with exact model, conversation, agent, and user correlation. Expand a row for the full structured response.

panels.title: Tool calls by tool name (range)
panels.description: Tool invocations grouped by tool name across all connectors.

panels.title: Tool calls by category (range)
panels.description: Tool calls bucketed into capability categories by tool name.

panels.title: Full tool commands (live)
panels.description: Every tool invocation with the FULL command / input. Shell commands render inline; expand any line for the structured event.

panels.title: Internet egress - websites the agent's tools contacted
Distinct external hosts
panels.description: Distinct non-local hostnames referenced in tool commands.

panels.title: Hosts contacted by tool commands (range)
panels.description: Hostnames extracted from URLs in tool commands (includes localhost stack endpoints).

panels.title: Network access detail (commands touching the internet)
panels.description: Audit events whose payload references a URL. Source for the egress host extraction above.

panels.title: Findings - rules, severity, runtime vs supply chain
Most common finding rules (range)
panels.description: Top finding RULE codes by volume (e.g. CMD-ENV-DUMP, PATH-ETC-PASSWD). Zero-volume rules hidden.

panels.title: Findings by severity
panels.description: Severity distribution of findings.

panels.title: Runtime vs supply-chain (by scanner)
panels.description: hook-rules = runtime tool/command findings; plugin-scanner = supply-chain (skills/mcp/plugins).

panels.title: Findings by rule x severity x scanner (range)
panels.description: Full finding breakdown. scanner column distinguishes runtime (hook-rules) from supply-chain (plugin-scanner).

panels.title: Finding detail (rule, target, severity)
panels.description: Per-finding events with scanner, target and rule. Expand for full detail.

panels.title: Supply chain - AI tool & dependency discovery
Discovered AI products (skills / mcp / plugins / deps)
panels.description: AI products & dependencies discovered on the host (supply-chain inventory).

panels.title: Discovery signals by category
panels.description: package_dependency vs supported_connector signals.

panels.title: Discovery signals by detector
panels.description: config vs package_manifest detectors.

panels.title: Session drilldown - correlate one run end-to-end
Tokens by model & type for selected session (gateway run)
panels.description: Input, output, cache-read, and cache-creation totals for the selected conversation.

panels.title: Hook events (session - any connector)
panels.description: Audit events recorded for the selected session.

panels.title: Shadow blocks (session)
panels.description: Would-be blocks within the selected session.

panels.title: Session timeline (prompt -> tools -> verdicts -> result)
panels.description: Every audit event for the selected session in time order. Expand a line for the full payload (prompt text, command, tool result, last assistant message).

targets.expr: {service_name="defenseclaw"} | (gen_ai_conversation_id=~"$session" or defenseclaw_session_parent_id=~"$session") | gen_ai_agent_id=~"$agent" | defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_id=~"$lifecycle" | user_id=~"$user" | line_format "[user={{.user_id}} agent={{.gen_ai_agent_name}} depth={{.defenseclaw_agent_depth}} state={{.defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_state}}] {{.defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_event}} {{.defenseclaw_tool_name}}"

panels.title: Agent lifecycle drilldown - user -> agent -> subagent -> tools and websites
Agent lifecycle transitions
panels.description: Explicit start, resume, turn, tool, compaction, subagent, and terminal transitions. Lifecycle ID stays stable across resumes; execution ID identifies one attempt.

targets.expr: {service_name="defenseclaw"} | defenseclaw_gateway_event_type="lifecycle" | defenseclaw_lifecycle_subsystem="agent" | (gen_ai_conversation_id=~"$session" or defenseclaw_session_parent_id=~"$session") | gen_ai_agent_id=~"$agent" | defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_id=~"$lifecycle" | user_id=~"$user" | line_format "{{.defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_event}} state={{.defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_state}} user={{.user_id}} agent={{.gen_ai_agent_name}} parent={{.defenseclaw_agent_parent_id}} parent_session={{.defenseclaw_session_parent_id}} execution={{.defenseclaw_agent_execution_id}}"

panels.title: Selected agent tools, destinations, and website activity
panels.description: Tool calls/results and network egress correlated to the selected user, agent, lifecycle, and conversation. Expand rows for arguments, URL/host, result, policy, and tool-call ID.

targets.expr: {service_name="defenseclaw"} | (gen_ai_conversation_id=~"$session" or defenseclaw_session_parent_id=~"$session") | gen_ai_agent_id=~"$agent" | defenseclaw_agent_lifecycle_id=~"$lifecycle" | user_id=~"$user" |~ "tool_invocation|egress|https?://" | line_format "{{.defenseclaw_gateway_event_type}} tool={{.defenseclaw_tool_name}} destination={{.defenseclaw_destination_app}} agent={{.gen_ai_agent_name}} parent_session={{.defenseclaw_session_parent_id}}"

panels.title: Lifecycle transitions / sec by connector and phase
panels.description: Low-cardinality aggregate lifecycle coverage. Per-user and per-agent detail stays in logs/traces to avoid unbounded Prometheus labels.

panels.title: OTLP records / sec by signal
panels.description: Inbound OTLP records by signal (metrics/logs/traces).

panels.title: Audit sink delivery & exporter errors / sec
panels.description: Audit sink throughput and OTLP exporter error rate.
